mdns.c(3) Library Functions Manual mdns.c(3)

NAME

mdns.c - mDNS service discovery UI wrapper for interactive server selection

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void ui_mdns_log_init (void)
Initialize log buffer for mDNS discovery UI. void ui_mdns_log_destroy (void)
Destroy mDNS discovery log buffer. void ui_mdns_log_clear (void)
Clear mDNS discovery log buffer. void ui_mdns_log_append (const char *message)
Append message to mDNS discovery log buffer. ui_mdns_server_t * ui_mdns_query (const ui_mdns_config_t *config, int *out_count)
TUI wrapper around core mDNS discovery. void ui_mdns_free_results (ui_mdns_server_t *servers)
Free results from mDNS discovery. int ui_mdns_prompt_selection (const ui_mdns_server_t *servers, int count)
Interactive server selection. int ui_mdns_select (const ui_mdns_server_t *servers, int count)
TUI-based server selection with formatted display. const char * ui_mdns_get_best_address (const ui_mdns_server_t *server)
Get best address for a server.

Detailed Description

mDNS service discovery UI wrapper for interactive server selection

Pure TUI wrapper that calls discovery_mdns_query() from discovery.c. Provides interactive terminal UI for server selection and address resolution.

Definition in file ui/mdns.c.

Function Documentation

void ui_mdns_free_results (ui_mdns_server_t * servers)

Free results from mDNS discovery. Free results from TUI discovery query.

Definition at line 77 of file ui/mdns.c.

77                                                      {
78   discovery_mdns_destroy(servers);
79 }




References discovery_mdns_destroy().






const
  char * ui_mdns_get_best_address (const ui_mdns_server_t *
  server)


Get best address for a server. Get best address representation for
    a discovered server.


Definition at line 236 of file ui/mdns.c.


236                                                                      {
237   if (!server) {
238     return "";
239   }
240 
241   // Prefer IPv4 > name > IPv6
242   if (server->ipv4[0] != '\0') {
243     return server->ipv4;
244   }
245   if (server->name[0] != '\0') {
246     return server->name;
247   }
248   if (server->ipv6[0] != '\0') {
249     return server->ipv6;
250   }
251 
252   return server->address; // Fallback to address field
253 }






References ui_mdns_server_t::address,
    ui_mdns_server_t::ipv4, ui_mdns_server_t::ipv6, and
    ui_mdns_server_t::name.


Referenced by ui_mdns_prompt_selection(), and
    ui_mdns_select().






void
  ui_mdns_log_append (const char * message)


Append message to mDNS discovery log buffer. Delegates to the
    logging system which automatically captures to session log buffer.




Parameters


message Log message to append

46                                              {
47   if (message) {
48     log_info("%s", message);
49   }
50 }






References log_info.






void
  ui_mdns_log_clear (void )


Clear mDNS discovery log buffer. Delegates to terminal_screen log
    clear. Useful when starting fresh mDNS discovery screen.

42                              {

  ui_mdns_log_destroy (void )

void
  ui_mdns_log_init (void )


Initialize log buffer for mDNS discovery UI. Delegates to
    terminal_screen log initialization. Call once at startup before rendering
    mDNS discovery screen.


Definition at line 30 of file ui/mdns.c.


30                             {
31   session_log_buffer_t *buf = terminal_screen_log_init();
32   if (buf) {
33     log_set_session_log_buffer(buf);
34   }
35 }






References log_set_session_log_buffer(), and
    terminal_screen_log_init().






int
  ui_mdns_prompt_selection (const ui_mdns_server_t * servers, int
  count)


Interactive server selection. Display discovered servers to user
    and prompt for selection.


Definition at line 84 of file ui/mdns.c.


84                                                                          {
85   if (!servers || count <= 0) {
86     return -1;
87   }
88 
89   // Display available servers
90   printf("\nAvailable ascii-chat servers on LAN:\n");
91   for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
92     const ui_mdns_server_t *srv = &servers[i];
93     const char *addr = ui_mdns_get_best_address(srv);
94     printf("  %d. %s (%s:%u)\n", i + 1, srv->name, addr, srv->port);
95   }
96 
97   // Prompt for selection
98   printf("\nSelect server (1-%d) or press Enter to cancel: ", count);
99   fflush(stdout);
100 
101   // Read user input
102   char input[32];
103   if (fgets(input, sizeof(input), stdin) == NULL) {
104     printf("\n");
105     return -1; // EOF or error
106   }
107 
108   // Check for empty input (Enter pressed)
109   if (input[0] == '\n' || input[0] == '\r' || input[0] == '\0') {
110     return -1; // User cancelled
111   }
112 
113   // Parse input as number
114   char *endptr;
115   long selection = strtol(input, &endptr, 10);
116 
117   // Validate input
118   if (selection < 1 || selection > count) {
119     printf("⚠️  Invalid selection. Please enter a number between 1 and %d\n", count);
120     return ui_mdns_prompt_selection(servers, count); // Re-prompt
121   }
122 
123   return (int)(selection - 1); // Convert to 0-based index
124 }






References ui_mdns_server_t::name,
    ui_mdns_server_t::port, ui_mdns_get_best_address(), and
    ui_mdns_prompt_selection().


Referenced by ui_mdns_prompt_selection().






ui_mdns_server_t * ui_mdns_query (const
  ui_mdns_config_t * config, int * out_count)


TUI wrapper around core mDNS discovery. Discover ascii-chat
    servers on the local network via mDNS.




Calls discovery_mdns_query() from discovery.c with
    TUI-friendly configuration.


Definition at line 57 of file ui/mdns.c.


57                                                                                 {
58   if (!out_count) {
59     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "out_count pointer is NULL");
60     return NULL;
61   }
62 
63   *out_count = 0;
64 
65   // Apply defaults if needed
66   int timeout_ms = (config && config->timeout_ms > 0) ? config->timeout_ms : 2000;
67   int max_servers = (config && config->max_servers > 0) ? config->max_servers : 20;
68   bool quiet = (config && config->quiet);
69 
70   // Call the core mDNS discovery function from discovery.c
71   return discovery_mdns_query(timeout_ms, max_servers, quiet, out_count);
72 }






References discovery_mdns_query(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ui_mdns_config_t::max_servers,
    ui_mdns_config_t::quiet, SET_ERRNO, and
    ui_mdns_config_t::timeout_ms.






int
  ui_mdns_select (const ui_mdns_server_t * servers, int count)


TUI-based server selection with formatted display. Displays
    discovered servers in a terminal UI with the following features:


    
  
  • Clears terminal and displays formatted server list
    • 
  
  • Shows "No results" message if no servers available
    • 
  
  • Allows numeric input for selection
    • 
  
  • Shows helpful prompts and icons
    • 



Parameters


servers Array of discovered servers


count Number of servers


Returns


0-based index of selected server, or -1 to cancel


Definition at line 141 of file ui/mdns.c.


141                                                                {
142   if (!servers || count <= 0) {
143     // No servers found - return special code
144     // Message will be printed at exit in client main
145     return -1;
146   }
147 
148   // Lock terminal to prevent concurrent logging from overwriting TUI
149   bool prev_lock_state = log_lock_terminal();
150 
151   // Clear terminal
152   log_plain("\033[2J\033[H");
153 
154   // Display header
155   log_plain("\n");
156   log_plain("\033[1m╭─ 🔍 ascii-chat Server Discovery ────────────╮\033[0m\n");
157   log_plain("\033[1m│\033[0m\n");
158   char found_buf[64];
159   snprintf(found_buf, sizeof(found_buf), "Found %d server%s on your local network:", count, count == 1 ? "" : "s");
160   log_plain("\033[1m│\033[0m %s\n", colored_string(LOG_COLOR_INFO, found_buf));
161   log_plain("\033[1m│\033[0m\n");
162 
163   // Display server list with formatting
164   for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
165     const ui_mdns_server_t *srv = &servers[i];
166     const char *addr = ui_mdns_get_best_address(srv);
167 
168     char idx_buf[8];
169     snprintf(idx_buf, sizeof(idx_buf), "[%d]", i + 1);
170     char addr_buf[128];
171     snprintf(addr_buf, sizeof(addr_buf), "%s:%u", addr, srv->port);
172 
173     log_plain("\033[1m│\033[0m  %s %-30s %s\n",
174               colored_string(LOG_COLOR_DEBUG, idx_buf), srv->name,
175               colored_string(LOG_COLOR_WARN, addr_buf));
176   }
177 
178   log_plain("\033[1m│\033[0m\n");
179   log_plain("\033[1m╰────────────────────────────────────────────╯\033[0m\n");
180 
181   // Prompt for selection
182   log_plain("\n");
183   log_plain("Enter server number (1-%d) or press Enter to cancel: ", count);
184   fflush(stdout);
185 
186   // Unlock before waiting for input (user might take time)
187   log_unlock_terminal(prev_lock_state);
188 
189   // Read user input
190   char input[32];
191   if (fgets(input, sizeof(input), stdin) == NULL) {
192     return -1;
193   }
194 
195   // Check for empty input (Enter pressed)
196   if (input[0] == '\n' || input[0] == '\r' || input[0] == '\0') {
197     return -1;
198   }
199 
200   // Parse input as number
201   char *endptr;
202   long selection = strtol(input, &endptr, 10);
203 
204   // Validate input
205   if (selection < 1 || selection > count) {
206     char err_buf[64];
207     snprintf(err_buf, sizeof(err_buf), "Please enter a number between 1 and %d", count);
208     printf("%s\n\n", colored_string(LOG_COLOR_WARN, err_buf));
209     return ui_mdns_select(servers, count); // Re-prompt
210   }
211 
212   // Lock terminal again for final output
213   prev_lock_state = log_lock_terminal();
214 
215   // Clear screen and show connection status
216   log_plain("\033[2J\033[H");
217   log_plain("\n");
218   char connect_buf[128];
219   snprintf(connect_buf, sizeof(connect_buf), "🔗 Connecting to %s...", servers[selection - 1].name);
220   log_plain("%s\n", colored_string(LOG_COLOR_INFO, connect_buf));
221   log_plain("\n");
222   fflush(stdout);
223 
224   // Brief delay so user can see the selection before logs overwrite it
225   platform_sleep_ms(200);
226 
227   // Unlock terminal now that TUI is complete
228   log_unlock_terminal(prev_lock_state);
229 
230   return (int)(selection - 1); // Convert to 0-based index
231 }






References colored_string(), LOG_COLOR_DEBUG,
    LOG_COLOR_INFO, LOG_COLOR_WARN, log_lock_terminal(),
    log_plain, log_unlock_terminal(),
    ui_mdns_server_t::name, platform_sleep_ms(),
    ui_mdns_server_t::port, ui_mdns_get_best_address(), and
    ui_mdns_select().


Referenced by ui_mdns_select().
